title: RSA Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Process
description: This flowchart illustrates the step-by-step process of securely establishing a shared secret key between two parties (Alice and Bob) using the RSA algorithm for authentication within the Diffie-Hellman key exchange.
relationships: Alice obtains Bob's RSA public key from PKI
Alice generates her DH private number (a) and public number (A = g^a mod p)
Alice encrypts A with Bob's public key and sends it
Bob decrypts A with his private key
Bob generates his DH private number (b) and public number (B = g^b mod p)
Bob encrypts B with Alice's public key and sends it
Alice decrypts B with her private key
Both compute the shared secret K (K = B^a mod p, K = A^b mod p)
